subjective.fact: The patient presents with right shoulder pain.
spans: right shoulder pain

subjective.fact: The patient's right shoulder pain began approximately three weeks ago.
spans: began approximately three weeks ago

subjective.fact: The patient's right shoulder pain started after a fall while painting a house.
spans: after a fall while painting a house

subjective.fact: The patient's right shoulder pain is intermittent.
spans: intermittent

subjective.fact: The patient's right shoulder pain is always present.
spans: always present

subjective.fact: The patient's right shoulder pain is exacerbated by lifting overhead.
spans: exacerbated by lifting overhead

subjective.fact: The patient has taken ibuprofen for pain relief.
spans: ibuprofen and acetaminophen (Tylenol) for pain relief

subjective.fact: The patient has taken acetaminophen (Tylenol) for pain relief.
spans: ibuprofen and acetaminophen (Tylenol) for pain relief

subjective.fact: The patient's reported pain level is 4 out of 10 when taking medication.
spans: reported pain level of 4 out of 10 when taking medication

subjective.fact: The patient's reported pain level is 6 out of 10 without medication.
spans: pain level is 6 out of 10

subjective.fact: The patient initially reported numbness and tingling in the arm after the injury.
spans: numbness and tingling in the arm initially after the injury

subjective.fact: The patient's numbness and tingling in the arm have resolved.
spans: this symptom has resolved

subjective.fact: The patient has no history of previous shoulder pain or injuries.
spans: no history of previous shoulder pain or injuries

subjective.fact: The patient denies any other symptoms.
spans: denies any other symptoms

subjective.fact: The patient is taking ibuprofen as needed for pain.
spans: Ibuprofen as needed for pain

subjective.fact: The patient is taking acetaminophen (Tylenol) as needed for pain.
spans: Acetaminophen (Tylenol) as needed for pain

objective.fact: The patient has limited active range of motion in the right shoulder.
spans: limited active and passive range of motion in the right shoulder

objective.fact: The patient has limited passive range of motion in the right shoulder.
spans: limited active and passive range of motion in the right shoulder

objective.fact: The patient has tenderness to the greater tuberosity of the humerus.
spans: tenderness to the greater tuberosity of the humerus

objective.fact: The patient has good strong bilateral hand grips.
spans: good strong bilateral hand grips

objective.fact: The patient has brisk capillary refill of less than three seconds.
spans: brisk capillary refill of less than three seconds

objective.fact: The patient has equal and bilateral response to sensation.
spans: equal and bilateral response to sensation and touch

objective.fact: The patient has equal and bilateral response to touch.
spans: equal and bilateral response to sensation and touch

objective.fact: The right shoulder x-ray reveals no fracture.
spans: The right shoulder x-ray reveals no fracture or bony abnormality

objective.fact: The right shoulder x-ray reveals no bony abnormality.
spans: The right shoulder x-ray reveals no fracture or bony abnormality

assessment.fact: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to rotator cuff tendinopathy.
spans: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to rotator cuff tendinopathy

assessment.fact: The patient has rotator cuff tendinopathy.
spans: Rotator cuff tendinopathy; [NOT MENTIONED]

plan.fact: The patient was prescribed ibuprofen as needed for pain.
spans: I prescribed ibuprofen as needed for pain

plan.fact: The patient's ibuprofen dose is as needed.
spans: as needed for pain

plan.fact: The patient's ibuprofen indication is for pain.
spans: for pain

plan.fact: An MRI of the right shoulder was ordered for the patient.
spans: I ordered an MRI of the right shoulder

plan.fact: The MRI is to rule out any other conditions for the patient.
spans: to rule out any other conditions

plan.fact: The patient was referred to physical therapy.
spans: I referred the patient to physical therapy

plan.fact: The patient's physical therapy duration is 6-8 weeks.
spans: for 6-8 weeks

plan.fact: The patient was recommended to take Tylenol for pain relief.
spans: I recommend the patient take Tylenol for pain relief

plan.fact: The patient should take Tylenol if they can tolerate it.
spans: if they can tolerate it

plan.fact: The patient's Tylenol indication is for pain relief.
spans: for pain relief

plan.fact: The patient will be seen in two weeks.
spans: I will see the patient in two weeks
I will see the patient in two weeks
